title: Loop Runner Script

artifacts.description: Core loop runner - runs AI agent in a loop until specs are met
Template for loop prompts with placeholders for task, spec, files, criteria

notes_for_orchestrator: Both backpressure.py and struggle_detector.py were not found (expected - parallel work). Implemented with stubs that return PASS/HEALTHY respectively, with a 'stub' flag in the response so the orchestrator can detect stub usage. The stubs are transparent - when the real scripts are created by W1.1 and W1.2, they'll be used automatically via subprocess. The script is fully functional for testing without those dependencies.
